title: StayAFK
body:
#  **🟢 StayAFK Mod**
![stayafk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa58cc81fbcc0d950f6da2c3f9811ed94a26aeee_0.webp)(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d30db35487c3e01ec2250a8813556ade53517a8_0.webp)(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4450569f8a58845532b4f77464001a8fa2f1ceac_0.webp)
Jumper & AutoEater is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that adds two powerful features to Minecraft:

- **Jumper →** Automatically jumps for you with customizable delay.
- **AutoEater →** Automatically eats food when your hunger bar drops below a certain threshold.

Both features are fully customizable and can be toggled at any time. Perfect for Survival, PvP, or even AFK sessions.

## **_✨ Features_**
### **🔹 Jumper**
Automatically jumps with a configurable delay.
Great for parkour, PvP (critical hits), or preventing AFK kicks on servers.
Optional critical hit mode: automatically jump while attacking for higher damage.
Toggleable with a single key.
Displays status messages above the XP bar (“Jumper Enabled/Disabled”) in green/red.
🔹 AutoEater
- Automatically consumes food from your inventory when your hunger drops below a set threshold.
- Blacklist support: exclude certain foods you don’t want to be eaten.
- Option to block eating while moving (except jumping).
- Manual eating is still possible — AutoEater won’t stop you from right-clicking.
- Displays status messages above the XP bar (“AutoEater Enabled/Disabled”) in green/red.

## **🎛️ Customization**

The mod uses **Cloth Config / AutoConfig**, making it easy to configure in-game:

- Enable/disable features
- Set jump delay (seconds)
- Set hunger threshold
- Manage blacklist & movement options
## **🎮 Controls**
- **U →** Toggle Jumper
- **Y →** Toggle AutoEater

## **📌 Use Cases**
- **Survival:** Never worry about forgetting to eat again.
- **PvP:** Gain an edge with automatic critical hits from timed jumps.
- **AFK:** Stay online by letting Jumper perform small periodic jumps.
## **🔧 Requirements**
- **Fabric Loader**
- **Cloth Config API** (for settings)
- Minecraft version: 1.21.4
## **🌍 Language Support**
- English 🇬🇧
- Turkish 🇹🇷
